modmenu.descriptionTranslation.flashback: Additional features and fixes for the Flashback replay editor.
flashbackextras.config.title: Flashback Extras
flashbackextras.config.subtitle: Features and fixes for Flashback.
flashbackextras.config.hover_hint: Hover a toggle to see what it does.
flashbackextras.option.timeline_horizont: Lets you move across the timeline more naturally with a horizontal wheel or trackpad swipe.
flashbackextras.option.export_presets.de: Save your favorite export settings so you can reuse them quickly instead of setting everything up again.
flashbackextras.option.export_crop_guide: Shows an on-screen frame for your current export shape and gently dims the area outside it.
flashbackextras.option.audio_timeline_fi: Keeps audio blocks and playback feeling more in sync when replay speed or timelapse effects change how time flows.
flashbackextras.option.export_warmup.des: Gets export options ready shortly after you open a replay, so the export window feels faster the first time you use it.
flashbackextras.export_presets.title: Presets
flashbackextras.export_presets.save_curr: Create a new preset from the current export settings
flashbackextras.export_presets.name: Preset Name
flashbackextras.export_presets.overwrite: Do you really want to overwrite preset '%s'?
